feat: add Bruker S3 bucket scanner and data releases page

  S3 bucket, groups 149 files into 11 dataset groups (20 trackable IDs
  including wtx_manuscript sub-datasets), and commits updated registry files
- New registry/bruker_files.txt (raw TSV), bruker_datasets.json (grouped),
  bruker_status.csv (curation status: downloaded/converted/uploaded)
- New docs/bruker.html tab with collapsible groups, status pills, file
  tables with direct S3 download links, and text filter
- Tab navigation added to docs/index.html
